multisetDiffSample.fingerprint: MD_Metadata/identificationInfo/MD_DataIdentification/abstract/CharacterString	The MDBC Mapping, Groundtruthing and Modeling team along with USM will conduct AUV acquisition at multiple deepwater dome sites for 11 operational days using the RV Point Sur. The mission will focus on two objectives - 1) Collect high-resolution multibeam bathymetry and backscatter over Macondo wellhead and impact area (MC252) using the USM Eagle Ray (ER) AUV, 2) collect high resolution data at other proximal dome features where significant feature anomalies of been identified from existing data
multisetDiffSample.text: The MDBC Mapping, Groundtruthing and Modeling team along with USM will conduct AUV acquisition at multiple deepwater dome sites for 11 operational days using the RV Point Sur. The mission will focus on two objectives - 1) Collect high-resolution multibeam bathymetry and backscatter over Macondo wellhead and impact area (MC252) using the USM Eagle Ray (ER) AUV, 2) collect high resolution data at other proximal dome features where significant feature anomalies of been identified from existing data

multisetDiffSample.fingerprint: MI_Metadata/identificationInfo/MD_DataIdentification/abstract/CharacterString	The MDBC Mapping, Groundtruthing and Modeling team along with USM will conduct AUV acquisition at multiple deepwater dome sites for 11 operational days using the RV Point Sur. The mission will focus on two objectives - 1) Collect high-resolution multibeam bathymetry and backscatter over Macondo wellhead and impact area (MC252) using the USM Eagle Ray (ER) AUV, 2) collect high resolution data at other proximal dome features where significant feature anomalies of been identified from existing data
